title: Canadian Curry Bowl
description: A flavorful and aromatic dish featuring Canadian wild salmon, served in a bowl with a side of spicy yellow curry sauce.
instructions: Season the salmon fillet with salt and pepper.
Heat the coconut oil in an oven-safe skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the salmon for 2-3 minutes per side, then transfer to the oven.
Roast in the oven for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, heat the curry paste in a small saucepan over medium heat.
Add the onion and garlic, and cook until softened.
Stir in the fierce chili flakes and fish sauce (if using).
Simmer the curry sauce for 2-3 minutes, or until heated through.
To serve, place the salmon on a bed of yellow rice or noodles, and spoon the curry sauce over the top.
